home_about_me: I am a full-stack web and mobile developer passionate about creating web applications. I have solid experience in front-end and back-end development, as well as database design. I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn and grow as a developer.
dev_fullstack: Full stack web and mobile developer
about_content: Starting my career in 2022 in the world of application development, and more specifically in web development, I have developed several applications that are as solid, robust, and flexible as each other. These applications have allowed me to gain solid experience in application development, whether web or mobile, and have also enabled me to declare myself as a full stack developer.
presentation_text: Mr. Le-duc. I just visited your portfolio and I would like to discuss with you !
baccalaureat_d_desc: I completed my secondary education at the __Lycée__ __Classique__ __d'Édea__ (Littoral Region), where I obtained my __Baccalauréat__ __D__ before settling in Douala-Cameroun to pursue my higher education.
bts_desc: Once my Baccalauréat obtained and shortly after moving to the city of __Douala__ (__Cameroon__), I decided to continue my studies at the __I__nstitut __U__niversitaire et __S__tratégique de l' __E__stuaire (__IUEs__ __/__ __Insam__) in Ndokoti, where I obtained my __BTS__ after two years of study in software engineering.
bachelor_degree_desc: After obtaining my __BTS__ in the field where I had always wanted to work, I told myself, << if I already have a __BTS__ in the field where I planned to work since I was little, why not continue up to the bachelor's degree? >> And so a year later, I obtained my __Bachelor__ __degree__ __in__ __software__ __engineering__ as planned.
internship_al_consulting_desc: I completed an internship at __AL-Consulting__ __Sarl__ where I learned to better use computer tools, specifically the software we used there to develop applications efficiently, namely __Visual__ __Studio__ __Code__. I also learned the rules of database creation and management using __SQL__ and also learned to use best practices in __Javascript__ and __PHP__.
employee_soif_desc: Admittedly, the __Soif__ company does not operate in my field (software engineering), but there I had the opportunity to experience what the professional world is like and thus improve my soft skills and my know-how.
internship_mt_consulting: Professional internship at MT Consulting Sarl
internship_mt_consulting_desc: At __MT__ __Consulting__ __Sarl__, I discovered __python__ and then learned to handle some simple modules of the __Odoo__ ERP.
internship_nala_security_consulting: Professional internship at NALA SECURITY CONSULTING
internship_nala_security_consulting_desc:
At __NALA__ __SECURITY__ __CONSULTING__, I used my expertise and the knowledge I already had to develop the company's web application.
This application was not just a simple reflection of the services offered by the company, but also an application where users could interact with each other and with the company, and also stay updated on the latest news concerning it.
page_not_found: Sorry but this page does not exist on this platform.
view_project: Click here to see it for yourself
student_qr_description:
__Student__ __QR__ is a mobile application for __QR__ __code__ __scanning__ allowing school security guards to quickly know if a student is up to date with their tuition fee installments by scanning the QR code linked to the student on their receipt.

The verification process is as follows:
- When the student arrives at the school gate, they present their payment receipt to one of the security guards present.
- The guard takes the receipt and simply scans the QR code on it.
- Then, the application decrypts the student's QR code and retrieves their information by returning the installments the student is supposed to pay; if they have paid, the box corresponding to the installment is checked, and if not, it is empty.

The application was developed using:
- __React__ __Native__: for the __front-end__ (views/interfaces),
- __Nestjs__: for the __back-end__ (application resource management),
- __Nativewind__: for the overall style/design of the application,
- __TypeORM__: for smooth, efficient, and simpler management of queries to the __database__ (__POSTGRESQL__),
- __Supabase__: for database deployment.
youmsversity_description:
__YoumsVersity__ is a social network ( __mobile__ __application__ ) designed exclusively for __teachers__ __and__ __students__, where different teachers wishing to share their knowledge can do so through __video__ or __image__ __posts__, allowing students to no longer be limited in terms of knowledge by their school levels.

This application was developed using:
- __React__ __Native__: for the __front-end__ (views/interfaces),
- __Nestjs__: for the __back-end__ (application resource management),
- __Nativewind__: for the overall style/design of the application,
- __TypeORM__: for smooth, efficient, and simpler management of queries to the __database__ (__POSTGRESQL__),
- __Supabase__: for database deployment, file storage, and user __authentication__.
nalas_website_description:
__Nala's__ __website__ is the web application of the company __NALA__ __SECURITY__ __CONSULTING__;
I developed it using the following technologies:
- __Next.js__: for the __front-end__ (views/interfaces) and the __back-end__ (application resource management), 
- __Tailwindcss__: for the overall style/design of the application, 
- __Prisma__: for smooth, efficient, and simpler management of queries to the __database__, 
- __Supabase__: for the deployment of the __database__ (which incidentally uses __POSTGRESQL__ as __DBMS__) and file storage.
portfolio_description:
This is simply this __portfolio__ that you are currently visiting:
To create it, I used the following technologies:
- __Next.js__: for the __front-end__ (views/interfaces) and the __back-end__ (application resource management), 
- __Tailwindcss__: for the overall style/design of the application.
projects_list_description: A small web application that I created in my early days with << __Next.js__ >>, it is a platform for publishing projects where different users wanting to share their ideas and realizations can do so simply and get feedback.
invtrack_description:
__InvTrack__ is a web application for __management__ __of__ __educational__ __equipment__, allowing you to move from the old method of equipment management (Manual via book or notebook) to the new digital age, thus ensuring rapid traceability of equipment.
I created it using the following technologies:
- __Laravel__: for the views or interfaces of the application and also for the management of the back-end,
- __Tailwindcss__: for the style of the different pages of the application.
ges_salles_description:
This is simply a small application for managing __online__ __room__ __reservations__ to allow different people to do so from home, regardless of the room's location or the owner's.
Technologies used:
- __Laravel__: for the front-end and back-end,
- __Tailwindcss__: for the overall style of each page of the system.
ges_location_description:
Application allowing ordinary people to not only find a __future__ __housing__ among several available on the platform but also to __publish__ on the platform if ever the desire to rent out a housing arises.
Technologies:
- __HTML5__ : for the first skeleton of each page,
- __CSS3__ : for the minimalist style of each page,
- __Javascript__ : for the smooth management of animations and system interactions,
- __PHP__ : for the management of the application on the server side.
e-commerce_description: Small application serving as a mockup for an __E-commerce__ site.
wallpapers_description: Small web application for downloading desktop wallpapers.
agpoo_description:
Web application for __management__ __of__ __reservations__ __of__ __travel__ __tickets__ __in__ __travel__ __agencies__ __in__ __the__ __city__ __of__ __Douala__ (__Cameroon__); this web application, which is incidentally my __BTS__ defense project, allows the inhabitants of the city of __douala__ to book their trips in advance from home and regardless of the agency.
Technologies used:
- __HTML5__ : for the first skeleton of each page,
- __CSS3__ : for the minimalist style of each page,
- __Javascript__ : for the smooth management of animations and system interactions,
- __PHP__ : for the management of the application on the server side.
map_page: Locate an agency via google map.
